# Traceability

_Generated by Loom. Derived view — do not edit._

## Requirements

- **US-001** [UserStory] A customer can place an order _(InProgress)_
  - solution: `SOL-001`
  - tests: `TC-002`, `TC-001`
  - **AC-001** [AcceptanceCriteria] An order can only be confirmed when it has at least one line
    - tests: `TC-001`
  - **AC-002** [AcceptanceCriteria] Lines can only be added while the order is a draft
    - tests: _none_
- **US-002** [UserStory] A user can browse the product catalog _(Approved)_
  - solution: `SOL-002`
  - tests: `TC-003`
  - **AC-003** [AcceptanceCriteria] Products are uniquely identified by SKU
    - tests: `TC-003`

## Solutions

### SOL-001 — Ordering is driven by the Order aggregate and the placeOrder workflow
for: `US-001`

Entitles:
- `Sales.Orders.Order.addLine` (operation)
- `Sales.Orders.Order.confirm` (operation)
- `Sales.Orders.placeOrder` (workflow)

### SOL-002 — The catalog is served by the Product aggregate on its own deployable
for: `US-002`

Entitles:
- `Catalog.Products.Product` (aggregate)
- `catalogApi` (deployable)

## Test cases

### TC-001 — Confirming an empty order is rejected
verifies: `AC-001`
executable tests: _none_

Covers:
- `Sales.Orders.Order.confirm` (operation)

### TC-002 — Add a line then confirm the order
verifies: `US-001`
executable tests: "create then confirm an order with one line"

Covers:
- `Sales.Orders.Order.addLine` (operation)
- `Sales.Orders.Order.confirm` (operation)

### TC-003 — Create a product and look it up by SKU
verifies: `AC-003`
executable tests: "create a product, look it up by id"

Covers:
- `Catalog.Products.Product` (aggregate)
